title: Museums Association of the Caribbean (MAC) Travel Fellowship
description: Funds a Caribbean museum, cultural heritage, or arts professional (or student in that sector) to attend the MAC Annual Conference, "Caribbean Museums: Connectors, Conveners, and Catalysts for Change," hosted by the Trinidad and Tobago Alliance of Museums, November 9-13, 2026 at the Hyatt Regency-Trinidad in Port of Spain. The award covers a complimentary economy airfare (booked by MAC, up to $1,000 USD), five nights of shared-room hotel accommodation, conference registration, one conference tour, and a one-year individual MAC membership. Applicants must currently be a MAC member, be a resident of the Caribbean working or studying in the museum/cultural heritage/arts sector, and be either a first-time AGM attendee or not have attended the AGM in five or more years. Priority is given to accepted conference presenters and to new/emerging professionals.
visaNote: This is professional conference attendance, not employment; applicants should confirm current visitor-entry requirements for Trinidad and Tobago based on their nationality.

title: Smithsonian Tropical Research Institute (STRI) General Internship Program
description: A short-term paid research internship at the Smithsonian Tropical Research Institute in Panama, open to undergraduates and recent graduates of any nationality interested in the tropical biology, ecology, and conservation research led by STRI scientists. Interns first contact a STRI staff scientist to arrange mentorship before applying through the Smithsonian's online academic appointment system (SOLAA). The program provides a stipend of $1,250/month for up to 3 months (total up to $3,750) to cover living expenses, plus round-trip coach airfare to Panama. Applications are accepted twice yearly, with the next cycle deadline October 15, 2026.
visaNote: Interns travel to Panama on a short-term entry permit arranged with STRI's support; this is a stipended research placement, not local employment.
